content: The 2024-2025 SOTA push for scalable, context-aware active learning agent memory can be reframed to treat every individual agent instantiation as a composable, queryable memory unit within a larger super-agent, rather than modeling memory only as a storage layer inside a single agent. This turns the problem of optimizing individual agent memory into optimizing how a collective of agents actively selects which of its member agents to query for new task knowledge.
